title: Delicious Deep-Fried Venezuelan Knafeh Papillote
description: Rich, snappy weeknight Venezuelan dish featuring Knafeh in a papillote, macrobiotic-friendly.

ingredients.name: Venezuelan Ricotta Cheese
ingredients.notes: microbiotic-friendly alternative: make your own with probiotic powder

ingredients.name: Tahini
ingredients.notes: ensure it's fresh, and store properly in airtight container

ingredients.name: Date Syrup
ingredients.notes: sweetener option: use stevia or honey

instructions: Mix the Venezuelan Ricotta Cheese with the Tahini, Date Syrup, Ground Cinnamon, and Ground Cardamom in a large bowl until smooth.
Place 1/4 cup of the cheese mixture onto the center of each phyllo sheet, and top with a sprinkle of chopped Unsalted Almonds.
Fold the phyllo sheets in half, then in half again, to form a triangle. Seal the edges to prevent filling from escaping during frying.
Heat the Coconut Oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat until it reaches 350°F (180°C).
Carefully place the phyllo triangles into the hot oil, and fry for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the fried Knafeh Papillote to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until crispy.
Once cooked, drizzle with Honey and serve warm.
